title: ĀGENSKALNA MARKET / LATVIA
subtitle: GET INSPIRED! A ROADMAP TO REPLICATE KNOWLEDGE AND EXPERIENCE ABOUT FAIR FOOD SUPPLY CHAINS
description: A roadmap presenting the renovation and operational strategy of Āgenskalna Market in Riga, combining local food provision with cultural, social, and digital services to foster a vibrant urban marketplace. It details the public-private funding model, partnership framework, and best practices for replicating fair food supply chains in other contexts.
